chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1431 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.671/2022 (C/A) 17-09-2025 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>><<<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner under instructions does not press the listed application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
